label: Work giver
description: Defines a work-finding unit that scans for potential jobs and creates them for eligible pawns. Each WorkTypeDef is served by one or more WorkGiverDefs.

giverClass.label: Giver class
giverClass.description: C# WorkGiver subclass that implements the job-finding logic at runtime.

workType.label: Work type
workType.description: WorkTypeDef that this giver belongs to. Controls scheduling, priority ordering, and the work column it appears under.

workTags.label: Work tags
workTags.description: WorkTags flags associated with this giver. Used for backstory work-disable checks and pawn incapability filtering. Each flag is a separate li child element.

priorityInType.label: Priority in type
priorityInType.description: Execution order within the parent WorkTypeDef. Lower values run before higher values. Default is 0.

verb.label: Verb
verb.description: Short action verb shown in the work tab UI and job reports. Marked MustTranslate; required for concrete givers.

gerund.label: Gerund
gerund.description: Present-participle form of the action verb shown while the pawn is actively working. Marked MustTranslate; required for concrete givers.

scanThings.label: Scan things
scanThings.description: If true, the giver scans nearby things for potential jobs.

scanCells.label: Scan cells
scanCells.description: If true, the giver scans map cells for potential jobs.

emergency.label: Emergency
emergency.description: If true, this giver runs before all non-emergency givers, bypassing normal work-type scheduling.

requiredCapacities.label: Required capacities
requiredCapacities.description: PawnCapacityDef references the pawn must possess. A pawn missing any listed capacity is skipped by this giver.

directOrderable.label: Direct orderable
directOrderable.description: If true, the player can issue a direct work order for this giver.

prioritizeSustains.label: Prioritize sustains
prioritizeSustains.description: If true, the scheduler prefers this giver when it would sustain an existing ongoing activity.

nonColonistsCanDo.label: Non-colonists can do
nonColonistsCanDo.description: If true, non-colonist pawns such as prisoners, slaves, and guests can perform this work.

tagToGive.label: Tag to give
tagToGive.description: JobTag assigned to jobs created by this giver. Controls interruption priority and job-tracker categorization.

equivalenceGroup.label: Equivalence group
equivalenceGroup.description: WorkGiverEquivalenceGroupDef that groups this giver with interchangeable givers so the scheduler treats them as a single unit.

canBeDoneWhileDrafted.label: Can be done while drafted
canBeDoneWhileDrafted.description: If true, this work can proceed when the pawn is in drafted mode.

autoTakeablePriorityDrafted.label: Auto-takeable priority (drafted)
autoTakeablePriorityDrafted.description: Auto-take priority when the pawn is drafted. -1 disables auto-take entirely.

forceMote.label: Force mote
forceMote.description: ThingDef mote spawned at the work location when this giver activates. Decorative only.

forceFleck.label: Force fleck
forceFleck.description: FleckDef particle effect spawned at the work location when this giver activates. Decorative only.

canBeDoneByMechs.label: Can be done by mechs
canBeDoneByMechs.description: If true, mechanoid pawns are eligible to receive jobs from this giver.

fixedBillGiverDefs.label: Fixed bill giver defs
fixedBillGiverDefs.description: ThingDef references for specific buildings that always provide bills for this giver, regardless of recipe assignments. Applies to WorkGiver_DoBill subclasses.

billGiversAllHumanlikes.label: Bill givers - all humanlikes
billGiversAllHumanlikes.description: If true, all living humanlike pawns are included as bill givers for this work. Applies to WorkGiver_DoBill subclasses.

billGiversAllHumanlikesCorpses.label: Bill givers - all humanlike corpses
billGiversAllHumanlikesCorpses.description: If true, all humanlike corpses are included as bill givers for this work. Applies to WorkGiver_DoBill subclasses.

billGiversAllMechanoids.label: Bill givers - all mechanoids
billGiversAllMechanoids.description: If true, all living mechanoid pawns are included as bill givers for this work. Applies to WorkGiver_DoBill subclasses.

billGiversAllMechanoidsCorpses.label: Bill givers - all mechanoid corpses
billGiversAllMechanoidsCorpses.description: If true, all mechanoid corpses are included as bill givers for this work. Applies to WorkGiver_DoBill subclasses.

billGiversAllAnimals.label: Bill givers - all animals
billGiversAllAnimals.description: If true, all living animal pawns are included as bill givers for this work. Applies to WorkGiver_DoBill subclasses.

billGiversAllAnimalsCorpses.label: Bill givers - all animal corpses
billGiversAllAnimalsCorpses.description: If true, all animal corpses are included as bill givers for this work. Applies to WorkGiver_DoBill subclasses.

feedHumanlikesOnly.label: Feed humanlikes only
feedHumanlikesOnly.description: If true, feeding work is restricted to humanlike pawns only.

feedAnimalsOnly.label: Feed animals only
feedAnimalsOnly.description: If true, feeding work is restricted to animal pawns only.

doesSmoothing.label: Does smoothing
doesSmoothing.description: If true, this giver is classified as a floor-smoothing work giver by floor-smoothing work logic.

scannerDef.label: Scanner def
scannerDef.description: ThingDef building that acts as the scanner for scanner-type work givers.

basic-work-giver.label: Basic work giver
basic-work-giver.description: A minimal work giver with a driver class, work type, and UI labels.
